content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.61%, Pharma (+2.29%), Metals (+1.75%), Realty (+1.89%), IT (+1.71%), Energy (+1.38%) all green. India VIX down 6.4% to 18.45 confirms risk-on. Power and pharma showing strongest momentum with multi-day breakouts. Book is already 54% deployed and showing positive unrealized P&L; priority is to manage existing positions rather than chase fresh breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 78.00,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position recovered from -3.1% to nearly flat as PSU bank participates with sector. Strong Q4 (PAT +27% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, CASA 52.5%) keeps thesis intact. Tighten SL from 77.50 to 78.00 (just below today's low 78.51 / S1 78.36) to reduce risk. Target unchanged at 85."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.47,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+6.1% unrealized gain. Current SL at 1035.47 already locks in gains above entry (entry 984). Stock printed today's low of 1040.75 — moving SL above this would risk premature stop on noise. Holding existing SL/target which already implements the trailing-SL mandate. No change needed; emitting HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.5% loss; defensive hedge thesis intact with gold near record highs and geopolitical risk premium. SL at 119 (~5% below entry) is appropriate for a low-volatility ETF. No action needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%); stock at 52w high zone. SL already at 1418 (above entry 1412.94) — already implements breakeven trail. Current SL/target unchanged; HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 694.48,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Stock made 52w high 710 then faded to 696; printed shooting-star pattern Apr 22. Q4 results due Apr 29 (binary event, 2 days). USFDA Form 483 overhang. Current SL at 694.48 is already trailing tightly above entry — appropriate for binary event risk. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Down -1.2%; Q4 results in 3 days (Apr 30) is binary. SL at 2260 (-4.7%) gives room through event. Position size small. Hold through results catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "+2.1% unrealized gain. Trailing-SL mandate applies (P&L >= +2%). Move SL from 404.50 (breakeven) to 406 — locks in small profit, just below today's low 402.60 buffered for noise but tighter than current. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.5% only — does not meet +2% trailing-SL threshold. Q4 returned to profit but GNPA 3.43% and governance overhang keep thesis fragile. SL at 850 (-3.2%) appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "SELL",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 110,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 443.00,
      "stop_loss": 443.00,
      "target": 443.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CANCEL pending TATAPOWER BUY @ 443 — stock has run to 454.30 (+2.5% above limit), thesis to enter at support no longer valid; cluster risk with NTPC already held in power/energy. Withdrawing the stale order to clean up the book. Note: this is a cancel intent on the working OPEN order."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY LIMIT @ 612 still OPEN. Stock at 615.55, near limit. Strong Q4 (PAT +67%, dividend Rs 11 with record date Apr 30) supports thesis. Letting existing order work — NOT stacking a second order. If unfilled by EOD, will reassess."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.28% gap on $11.75bn Organon acquisition but research flags BEARISH due to leverage/integration concerns and 35x P/E premium. Chasing a one-day gap into news is the worst entry. MACD still bearish crossover on daily. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +6.4% to fresh ATH with VWAP at 1776 well below CMP 1808. Cluster risk: already hold NTPC in power/energy. Adding another power name violates cluster discipline. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Active ED money-laundering probe with raid Apr 24. Bounce today is a dead-cat after -9.4% on raid news. Headline/regulatory risk is uncapped. Hard pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "UTIAMC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 swung to net loss; FY26 PAT -45%. Today's bounce on 6.3x volume is post-results dead-cat after -11.26% drop. Thesis unclear. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong setup but already 54% deployed and CMP 184.32 is at upper Bollinger Band with VWAP 183.62. Better entry would be on retest of 178-180. Watchlist hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Cluster risk with NTPC already held in power/energy theme. Per cluster discipline, one expression of power theme is sufficient."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AXISBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -3.67% post weak Q4 (provisions +139%). Catching falling knife into deteriorating fundamentals. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already have GRANULES exposure in pharma. Pharma sector at extended levels post +2.29% rally; better entry on pullback."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "IDFCFIRSTB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already have INDUSINDBK in banking; sector concentration risk. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HSCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "10x volume surge with only +1% price move can be either accumulation or distribution. Without clearer signal, capital preservation wins. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PVRINOX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Capacity at 54% deployed; need higher conviction setup to add. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ALKEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already have GRANULES in pharma. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 78.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 77.50 to 78.00 just below today's low / S1 to reduce risk-budget consumption while keeping room for the PSU bank thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1035.47 already locks in ~5% gain above entry. Today's low 1040.75 — tightening further risks getting wicked out. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge intact; minor unrealized loss; SL appropriately wide for low-vol ETF."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1418 already at breakeven+. Strong Q4 supports continued upside; let it run toward 1480 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 694.48 already trailing tightly above entry. Q4 results in 2 days — current SL appropriately lets event play out with capped downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results Apr 30 binary event. SL at 2260 (-4.7%) gives room through volatility. Position size modest."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "reasoning": "Per trailing-SL mandate (P&L >= +2%), move SL from 404.50 to 406 to lock in small gain while staying just below today's low 402.60 with buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Only +0.5% — doesn't trigger trailing-SL threshold. Hold existing SL through Q4 momentum."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SAIL — wait for pullback to 178-180 for cleaner entry. HINDZINC — let pending BUY @ 612 work; will reassess if unfilled. PHARMABEES, POWERGRID — keep watching but blocked by cluster/sector concentration today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 54% deployed with 8 holdings showing net positive unrealized P&L (+0.4% on day). One pending HINDZINC BUY still working — letting it fill. Cancelling stale TATAPOWER pending BUY (price ran away, cluster risk with NTPC). Per deployment hysteresis rule, default disposition for new entries today is NO_ACTION unless materially better than what's held — none of today's gainers clear that bar (most are extended one-day gappers with sector cluster overlap). Focus is on tightening risk on MAHABANK and trailing NTPC SL to lock in early gains. Multiple binary earnings events in next 3 days (HUL Apr 30, Granules Apr 29) — risk-managed via existing tight SLs."
}
